Careers

Join Our Team

Daltco Electric is Eastern Ontario’s largest independent electrical,lighting, and automation distributor. Daltco serves the industrial,commercial and residential marketplaces from its three locationsin Kingston, Brockville and Ottawa.

At Daltco you’re not just a number, you’re a valued member of adynamic team. Our company culture prioritizes individual growthand collaboration, ensuring that your unique skills andcontributions are recognized and celebrated. Joining Daltco meansbecoming an integral part of an inclusive and supportivecommunity where your ideas, passion, and dedication truly matter.Your journey here is not just a job; it's a meaningful and fulfillingexperience where your potential can thrive.

See Open Positions

Our Hiring Process
1. Application Review

A member of our HR team will review your application and let you know if you are a match to a position!

2. Intro Call
